metadata.notes: System notifies relevant actors about the assignment according to the notification defined in the Associated Information

inputs.vague: The Spirit Director assigns an approved appearance request to an available SuperFrog Student. The system then updates the request's status and adds it to the student's schedule, confirming the assignment to the director.
inputs.detailed:
Primary Actor:
Spirit Director
Secondary Actors:
SuperFrog Student
Trigger:
The Spirit Director indicates to assign a SuperFrog Student to an “Approved” request.
Description:
The Spirit Director wants to assign a SuperFrog Student to an “Approved” request, so that she is sure that a SuperFrog Student will appear in this event.
Preconditions:
PRE-1. There exists at least one “Approved” request in the System.
PRE-2. The Spirit Director is logged into the System.
PRE-3. The User has the “admin” privilege.
Postconditions:
POST-1. The request is updated in the System with a status of “Assigned”.
POST-2. The request is added to the SuperFrog Student’s personal schedule.
Main Success Scenario:
The Spirit Director indicates to assign a SuperFrog Student to an “Approved” request.
The Spirit Director views the details of this appearance request through UC-7: View an appearance request.
The System asks the Spirit Director to assign this appearance to a SuperFrog Student by prompting a list of available SuperFrog Students.
The Spirit Director assigns this appearance to a SuperFrog Student in the list and confirms that she has finished assigning.
The System updates the status of this request from “Approved” to “Assigned”. 
The System adds this request to the SuperFrog Student’s personal schedule.
The System informs the Spirit Director that the request has been assigned to a SuperFrog Student.
The System notifies relevant actors about the assignment according to the “Notification” defined in the Associated Information of this use case.
Use case ends.

groundTruth.name: Assign an Approved Request to a SuperFrog Student
groundTruth.summary: The Spirit Director assigns an 'Approved' request to a SuperFrog Student to ensure the event has the SuperFrog Student's presence.
preconditions: There exists at least one “Approved” request in the System.
The Spirit Director is logged into the System.

steps.description: Indicates to assign a SuperFrog Student to an "Approved" request.
Views the details of the appearance request.
Prompts a list of available SuperFrog Students for assignment.
Assigns the appearance to a SuperFrog Student from the list and confirms the assignment.
Updates the status of this request from "Approved" to "Assigned".
Adds this request to the SuperFrog Student's personal schedule.
Informs the Spirit Director that the request has been assigned.
Notifies relevant actors about the assignment according to the "Notification" defined.
